description_long: This sculpture depicts a life-sized seated male figure, dressed in a suit and tie, resting on a simple wooden bench with one arm propped on the armrest and his head leaning on his hand in a contemplative pose. The figure and bench are rendered in a metallic, likely bronze, finish with realistic detailing in the clothing folds, facial features, and shoes. The entire composition is mounted on a large rectangular stone pedestal, which features an engraved signature and inscription on the front face. The base is surrounded by a small patch of grass, suggesting an outdoor installation. The bench is open on one side, inviting viewers to sit beside the figure. The overall impression is one of quiet reflection and accessibility, blending art with public interaction.
description: A life-sized bronze sculpture of a seated man in a suit on a bench, mounted on a stone pedestal with an inscription. The figure appears contemplative, inviting viewers to sit beside him.
description_view_0: Front view showing the detailed face, crossed legs, and the inviting open space on the bench next to the figure.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the figure's profile, the arm resting on the bench, and the solid stone base.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the figure and bench, with the full width of the stone pedestal visible.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the figure's thoughtful pose and the bench's curved armrest.
attribute_subject_matter: seated human figure on a bench
attribute_location_context: The sculpture is installed outdoors, likely in a park or public green space, as indicated by the grass around the stone base.
